seo.title: East Side Auto Repair | Trusted Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Expert auto repair and maintenance in Dallas. From brake repairs to engine diagnostics, our certified mechanics keep you safe on the road. Call (469) 508-8974.

hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair & Maintenance in Dallas
hero.subheadline: Certified mechanics providing honest, high-quality service for all makes and models. Get back on the road with confidence.

featureSections.title: Advanced Diagnostics for Accurate Repairs
featureSections.body: We use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to pinpoint issues quickly and accurately, saving you time and money. No guesswork, just results.
featureSections.cardBody: Accurate diagnostics mean we fix it right the first time, so you don't have to come back.

featureSections.title: Routine Maintenance to Extend Vehicle Life
featureSections.body: Regular maintenance is the key to a long-lasting vehicle. Our preventive services keep your car running smoothly and help avoid costly breakdowns.
featureSections.cardBody: Every maintenance visit includes a complimentary 30-point inspection to catch small issues before they become big problems.

home.whyTitle: Why Choose East Side Auto Repair?

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team is ASE-certified and continuously trained on the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We provide detailed estimates upfront with no hidden fees, so you know exactly what to expect.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs are completed within 24 hours, getting you back on the road quickly.

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty on Repairs
whyChooseUs.description: All parts and labor are backed by a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty for your peace of mind.

testimonials.quote: East Side Auto Repair saved me hundreds compared to the dealer. They were honest and fixed my AC quickly. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Mike T.

testimonials.quote: I've been bringing my car here for years. They always explain what's needed and never push unnecessary work. Trustworthy team.
testimonials.author: Linda R.

testimonials.quote: Had an emergency brake issue on a Saturday. They got me in same day and had me driving safely in under two hours. Amazing service!
testimonials.author: James K.

cta.headline: Ready to Experience Reliable Auto Repair?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online to get your vehicle serviced by Dallas's most trusted mechanics.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, East Side Auto Repair offers comprehensive auto services for all makes and models. Our certified technicians use top-tier equipment to ensure your vehicle runs safely and efficiently.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repairs to restore performance.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic tools quickly identify engine issues, from misfires to sensor failures. We handle everything from minor tune-ups to complete engine overhauls, using quality parts and proven techniques.
benefits: Restore engine power and fuel efficiency
Extend engine lifespan with proper repairs
Reduce risk of breakdowns with early detection

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to read error codes and live data.

process.title: In-Depth Inspection
process.description: Our technician performs a thorough inspection to confirm the root cause.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We complete the repair and test-drive your vehicle to ensure optimal performance.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on the complexity.

faqs.question: Do you use OEM or aftermarket parts?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality OEM and aftermarket parts, all backed by warranty.

services.title: Brake Services
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspection, repair, and replacement for safety.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. We offer comprehensive brake services, including pad and rotor replacement, caliper repair, and brake fluid flushes to ensure reliable stopping power.
benefits: Prevent costly rotor and caliper damage

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We check pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid levels.

process.title: Component Replacement
process.description: Worn parts are replaced with premium components.

process.title: Brake Test
process.description: We test the brakes on the road to confirm smooth, quiet operation.

faqs.question: How often should I replace brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake problems?
faqs.answer: Squeaking, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal are common indicators.

services.title: Oil Changes & Fluid Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Regular oil changes and fluid checks to keep your engine healthy.
services.longDescription: Oil is the lifeblood of your engine. We offer conventional and synthetic oil changes, plus complete fluid inspections including coolant, transmission, brake, and power steering fluids to keep your car running smoothly.
benefits: Extend engine life and improve performance

process.title: Drain & Replace Oil
process.description: We drain old oil and replace with the correct grade and filter.

process.title: Fluid Level Check
process.description: All fluid levels are topped off and inspected for leaks.

process.title: Complimentary Inspection
process.description: We perform a quick 10-point check including belts, hoses, and tire pressure.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000-5,000 miles for conventional oil, up to 7,500 for synthetic.

faqs.question: Can I switch from conventional to synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can safely switch your vehicle to synthetic oil for better protection.

services.title: Tire Services
services.shortDescription: Tire rotation, balancing, alignment, and replacement.
services.longDescription: Proper tire care ensures safety and even tread wear. We offer tire rotations, balancing, wheel alignments, and new tire installation. Our technicians help you choose the right tires for your driving needs and budget.
benefits: Extend tire life and improve handling

process.title: Tire Inspection
process.description: We check tread depth, wear patterns, and tire pressure.

process.title: Rotation & Balancing
process.description: Tires are rotated and balanced to ensure even wear.

process.title: Alignment Check
process.description: We align wheels to manufacturer specs for straight tracking.

faqs.question: How often should I rotate my tires?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000-7,500 miles or with each oil change.

faqs.question: Do you sell tires?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a wide selection of new tires from top brands at competitive prices.

about.headline: Your Trusted Local Auto Repair Shop in Dallas
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe and mobile, building lasting relationships through transparency and expertise.
story: East Side Auto Repair was founded in 2008 with a simple mission: offer Dallas drivers a better choice for auto repair. Frustrated by dealership markups and chain shop upselling, our founder Michael opened a shop focused on honesty, quality, and customer education. What started as a two-bay garage in East Dallas quickly grew into a trusted neighborhood staple.

Today, we continue that tradition with a team of ASE-certified technicians and a commitment to transparent communication. We treat every vehicle as if it were our own, using advanced diagnostics and quality parts to ensure lasting repairs. Whether it's a simple oil change or a complex engine rebuild, you can count on East Side Auto Repair for fair pricing and exceptional service.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs and always explain your options clearly.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer standards for every repair.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local businesses and treat our customers like neighbors.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We stand behind our work with strong warranties and on-time service.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with East Side Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? Give us a call or stop by our shop.
